那现在，我需要考虑输入的参数是否正确。例如，输入的landStartTime和landDuration的长度相同，water的也一样。所以，代码中不需要处理这些情况，因为题目保证输入是正确的。

那现在，编写JavaScript函数：

function solve(landStartTime, landDuration, waterStartTime, waterDuration) {

  let minTime = Infinity;

  for (let i = 0; i < landStartTime.length; i++) {

    for (let j = 0; j < waterStartTime.length; j++) {

      // case1: land first, then water

      let landEnd = landStartTime[i] + landDuration[i];

      let waterStart = Math.max(landEnd, waterStartTime[j]);

      let case1EndTime = waterStart + waterDuration[j];

      // case2: water first, then land

      let waterEnd = waterStartTime[j] + waterDuration[j];

      let landStart = Math.max(waterEnd, landStartTime[i]);

      let case2EndTime = landStart + landDuration[i];

      // compare with minTime

      minTime = Math.min(minTime, case1EndTime, case2EndTime);

    }

  }

  return minTime;

}
